lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਰਸੁ ਪੇਖਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਭ ਪੂਰਨ ਹੋਈ ਆਸਾ ॥੨॥੧੫॥੩੮॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak daras pekh sukh paaeaa sabh pooran hoee aasaa |2|15|38|
lines.english: Says Nanak, gazing upon the Blessed Vision of His Darshan, I have found peace, and all my hopes have been fulfilled. ||2||15||38||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: saarag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Saarang, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਨ ਮਾਰਗ ਜੇਤਾ ਕਿਛੁ ਧਾਈਐ ਤੇਤੋ ਹੀ ਦੁਖੁ ਹਾਵਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aan maarag jetaa kichh dhaaeeai teto hee dukh haavaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The more you walk on any other path, the more you suffer in pain. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨਹ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਮਾਰਗੁ ਸੁਹਾਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: charanah gobind maarag suhaavaa |
lines.english: The most beautiful path for the feet is to follow the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੇਤ੍ਰ ਪੁਨੀਤ ਭਏ ਦਰਸੁ ਪੇਖੇ ਹਸਤ ਪੁਨੀਤ ਟਹਲਾਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: netr puneet bhe daras pekhe hasat puneet ttahalaavaa |
lines.english: The eyes are sanctified, gazing upon the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan. Serving Him, the hands are sanctified.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਿਦਾ ਪੁਨੀਤ ਰਿਦੈ ਹਰਿ ਬਸਿਓ ਮਸਤ ਪੁਨੀਤ ਸੰਤ ਧੂਰਾਵਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ridaa puneet ridai har basio masat puneet sant dhooraavaa |1|
lines.english: The heart is sanctified, when the Lord abides within the heart; that forehead which touches the dust of the feet of the Saints is sanctified. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਨਾਮਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਕਰਮਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਤਿਨਿ ਪਾਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: sarab nidhaan naam har har kai jis karam likhiaa tin paavaa |
lines.english: All treasures are in the Name of the Lord, Har, Har; he alone obtains it, who has it written in his karma.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਉ ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਭੇਟਿਓ ਸੁਖਿ ਸਹਜੇ ਅਨਦ ਬਿਹਾਵਾ ॥੨॥੧੬॥੩੯॥
lines.translit: jan naanak kau gur pooraa bhettio sukh sahaje anad bihaavaa |2|16|39|
lines.english: Servant Nanak has met with the Perfect Guru; he passes his life-night in peace, poise and pleasure. ||2||16||39||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: saarag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Saarang, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਿਆਇਓ ਅੰਤਿ ਬਾਰ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਖਾ ॥
lines.translit: dhiaaeo ant baar naam sakhaa |
lines.english: Meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord; at the very last instant, it shall be your Help and Support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਮਾਤ ਪਿਤਾ ਸੁਤ ਭਾਈ ਨ ਪਹੁਚੈ ਤਹਾ ਤਹਾ ਤੂ ਰਖਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jeh maat pitaa sut bhaaee na pahuchai tahaa tahaa too rakhaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: In that place where your mother, father, children and siblings shall be of no use to you at all, there, the Name alone shall save you. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧ ਕੂਪ ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਮਹਿ ਤਿਨਿ ਸਿਮਰਿਓ ਜਿਸੁ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਲੇਖੁ ਲਿਖਾ ॥
lines.translit: andh koop grih meh tin simario jis masatak lekh likhaa |
lines.english: He alone meditates on the Lord in the deep dark pit of his own household, upon whose forehead such destiny is written.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੂਲੑੇ ਬੰਧਨ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਗੁਰਿ ਕੀਨੀ ਸਭ ਤੂਹੈ ਤੁਹੀ ਦਿਖਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: khoolae bandhan mukat gur keenee sabh toohai tuhee dikhaa |1|
lines.english: His bonds are loosened, and the Guru liberates him. He sees You, O Lord, everywhere. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁਖ ਸਹਜੁ ਮੈ ਪਾਇਆ ਗੁਰਿ ਲਾਹੀ ਸਗਲ ਤਿਖਾ ॥੨॥੧੭॥੪੦॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak sukh sehaj mai paaeaa gur laahee sagal tikhaa |2|17|40|
lines.english: Says Nanak, I have obtained celestial peace and poise; the Guru has quenched all my thirst. ||2||17||40||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਪੀਆ ਮਨੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿਆ ਆਘਾਏ ਰਸਨ ਚਖਾ ॥
lines.translit: amrit naam peea man tripatiaa aaghaae rasan chakhaa |
lines.english: Drinking in the Ambrosial Nectar of the Naam, his mind is satisfied. Tasting it, his tongue is satiated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: saarag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Saarang, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿ ਐਸੇ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur mil aise prabhoo dhiaaeaa |
lines.english: Meeting the Guru, I meditate on God in such a way,

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਇਓ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲੁ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਦੁਖ ਭੰਜਨੁ ਲਗੈ ਨ ਤਾਤੀ ਬਾਇਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bheo kripaal deaal dukh bhanjan lagai na taatee baaeaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: that He has become kind and compassionate to me. He is the Destroyer of pain; He does not allow the hot wind to even touch me. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਤੇ ਸਾਸ ਸਾਸ ਹਮ ਲੇਤੇ ਤੇਤੇ ਹੀ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jete saas saas ham lete tete hee gun gaaeaa |
lines.english: With each and every breath I take, I sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਮਖ ਨ ਬਿਛੁਰੈ ਘਰੀ ਨ ਬਿਸਰੈ ਸਦ ਸੰਗੇ ਜਤ ਜਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: nimakh na bichhurai gharee na bisarai sad sange jat jaaeaa |1|
lines.english: He is not separated from me, even for an instant, and I never forget Him. He is always with me, wherever I go. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਬਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਕਉ ਬਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਗੁਰ ਦਰਸਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau bal bal bal bal charan kamal kau bal bal gur darasaaeaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, a sacrifice, a sacrifice, a sacrifice to His Lotus Feet. I am a sacrifice, a sacrifice to the Blessed Vision of the Guru's Darshan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਾਹੂ ਪਰਵਾਹਾ ਜਉ ਸੁਖ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਮੈ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੨॥੧੮॥੪੧॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak kaahoo paravaahaa jau sukh saagar mai paaeaa |2|18|41|
lines.english: Says Nanak, I do not care about anything else; I have found the Lord, the Ocean of peace. ||2||18||41||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: saarag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Saarang, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੈ ਮਨਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਲਗੋ ਗੁਰ ਮੀਠਾ ॥
lines.translit: merai man sabad lago gur meetthaa |
lines.english: The Word of the Guru's Shabad seems so sweet to my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੁਲੑਿਓ ਕਰਮੁ ਭਇਓ ਪਰਗਾਸਾ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਡੀਠਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: khulaio karam bheo paragaasaa ghatt ghatt har har ddeetthaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: My karma has been activated, and the Divine Radiance of the Lord, Har, Har, is manifest in each and every heart. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਆਜੋਨੀ ਸੰਭਉ ਸਰਬ ਥਾਨ ਘਟ ਬੀਠਾ ॥
lines.translit: paarabraham aajonee sanbhau sarab thaan ghatt beetthaa |
lines.english: The Supreme Lord God, beyond birth, Self-existent, is seated within every heart everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਇਓ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮਾ ਬਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਚਰਣੀਠਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bheo paraapat amrit naamaa bal bal prabh charaneetthaa |1|
lines.english: I have come to obtain the Ambrosial Nectar of the Naam, the Name of the Lord. I am a sacrifice, a sacrifice to the Lotus Feet of God. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਕੀ ਰੇਣੁ ਮੁਖਿ ਲਾਗੀ ਕੀਏ ਸਗਲ ਤੀਰਥ ਮਜਨੀਠਾ ॥
lines.translit: satasangat kee ren mukh laagee kee sagal teerath majaneetthaa |
lines.english: I anoint my forehead with the dust of the Society of the Saints; it is as if I have bathed at all the sacred shrines of pilgrimage.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਰੰਗਿ ਚਲੂਲ ਭਏ ਹੈ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗੁ ਨ ਲਹੈ ਮਜੀਠਾ ॥੨॥੧੯॥੪੨॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak rang chalool bhe hai har rang na lahai majeetthaa |2|19|42|
lines.english: Says Nanak, I am dyed in the deep crimson color of His Love; the Love of my Lord shall never fade away. ||2||19||42||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੀਓ ਗੁਰਿ ਸਾਥੇ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam deeo gur saathe |
lines.english: The Guru has given me the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, as my Companion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: saarag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Saarang, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਮਖ ਬਚਨੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਹੀਅਰੈ ਬਸਿਓ ਸਗਲ ਭੂਖ ਮੇਰੀ ਲਾਥੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: nimakh bachan prabh heearai basio sagal bhookh meree laathe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: If the Word of God dwells within my heart for even an instant, all my hunger is relieved. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਗੁਣ ਨਾਇਕ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਸੁਖ ਸਮੂਹ ਸਭ ਨਾਥੇ ॥
lines.translit: kripaa nidhaan gun naaeik tthaakur sukh samooh sabh naathe |
lines.english: O Treasure of Mercy, Master of Excellence, my Lord and Master, Ocean of peace, Lord of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੈਣ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਾਸੇ ਦੇਖਿ ਦਰਸਾਵਾ ਗੁਰਿ ਕਰ ਧਾਰੇ ਮੇਰੈ ਮਾਥੇ ॥
lines.translit: nain tripataase dekh darasaavaa gur kar dhaare merai maathe |
lines.english: My eyes were satisfied and fulfilled, gazing upon the Blessed Vision of His Darshan, when the Guru placed His Hand on my forehead.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕ ਆਸ ਮੋਹਿ ਤੇਰੀ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਅਉਰ ਦੁਤੀਆ ਆਸ ਬਿਰਾਥੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ek aas mohi teree suaamee aaur duteea aas biraathe |1|
lines.english: My hopes rest in You alone, O my Lord and Master; hope in anything else is useless. ||1||
